design_philosophy: Dense scannable table with inline row-expand detail; for the Importer's high-volume review.
strengths: Many transactions visible at once for fast scanning
Detail opens inline without leaving the queue
Compact rows keep more of the batch in view
weaknesses: Tight rows are harder to read carefully
Less room for status and amount to stand out
Dense layout can feel busy on small screens
tradeoffs: Shows far more of the batch at once, but trades the calm spacing that makes careful single-record review easier.
use_when: High-volume reviewers scanning many imported transactions per file.
